name: Haselnussmakronen-Hazlenut Macaroons Germany
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the sugar to the egg whites and continue beating until stiff peaks form.
2. Gradually add the remaining ingredients and gently fold them in.
3. Drop teaspoons of mixture onto a greased cookie sheet about 1 inch apart.
4. Allow the macaroons to stand for a few minutes before baking in an oven set to 300°F (150°C) for half an hour.
5. Carefully transfer the baked macaroons to a cooling rack.
6. Store in an airtight container. They will keep for weeks. The number of servings depends on the size of the cookies you make.
